site.name: GridLine Club
site.description: Your destination for F1 race coverage, regulation analysis, and technical deep dives into the world of motorsport.

hero.introText: From race recaps and championship standings to deep dives into technical regulations and tire strategy, GridLine Club covers every angle of Formula 1. Follow the 2026 season with race calendars showing times in US Eastern and Brazilian timezones, detailed post-race analysis, and beginner-friendly explainers that make the sport accessible to everyone.

posts.heading: F1 Articles, Race Recaps & Analysis
posts.metaDescription: All articles about Formula 1 — regulations, race recaps, technical analysis, and explainers.

calendar.heading: F1 2026 Race Calendar
calendar.metaDescription: Complete 2026 Formula 1 race calendar with session times in US Eastern (ET) and Brazil (BRT) timezones.
calendar.timezoneSuffix: timezones. Times automatically adjust for daylight saving.

standings.metaDescription: Live Formula 1 2026 driver and constructor championship standings.

about.heading: About GridLine Club
about.metaDescription: About GridLine Club — a motorsport blog covering Formula 1 regulations, race recaps, and technical analysis.
about.intro: GridLine Club is a motorsport blog dedicated to bringing you in-depth coverage of Formula 1 and the wider world of racing. We cover race weekends, break down regulations, explain the technical side of the sport, and help newcomers understand what makes motorsport so thrilling.
about.coverRecaps: Race Recaps — Post-race analysis, key moments, and results from every Grand Prix weekend.
about.coverRegulations: Regulations — Deep dives into FIA rule changes, cost cap updates, and how regulations shape the sport.
about.coverTechnical: Technical Analysis — How F1 cars work, aerodynamic concepts, power unit technology, and engineering innovations.
about.coverHowItWorks: How It Works — Beginner-friendly explainers covering tire strategy, qualifying formats, sprint races, and more.
about.calendarDesc: We maintain a complete F1 race calendar with session times in both US Eastern (ET) and Brazilian (BRT) timezones, plus a countdown to the next race. Never miss a session again.
about.missionDesc: Whether you're a lifelong motorsport fan or just discovering the thrill of racing, GridLine Club aims to be your go-to resource for understanding and enjoying the sport. We believe that the best way to appreciate motorsport is to understand the details behind it — the strategies, the engineering, and the rules that create the spectacle we all love.

notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
